choice_reason: k=5 is locked for the public map after checking k=3..7: it has the strongest silhouette score in this run while preserving interpretable differences across assigned quality, local school quality, local school supply, and selective access without tiny singleton groups.

method: Robust-scaled KMeans over community-area school/access indices; PCA saved for explanation only.
notes: Groups are descriptive patterns, not causal claims.
Distances are straight-line distances unless a future routing pipeline replaces them.
Race, income, and poverty are not clustering inputs; they are displayed only as context.
